_comment: Biome-aware target surface height (top of blend tree). lerp(blend_ero_hi, polar@180, w_polar). Each biome maps to its Y band; flat biomes (polar/tholin/barren) get gentle wobble, rugged ones (methane/cratered/cryo) get biome_height relief; adjacent bands blend over a narrow climate window (w_* ramps) = short talus transition. flat_cache: Y-independent, one eval per column.
